steps.description: Audit and correct the backend file upload route implementation so it matches the requested API contract and avoids the prior type-check regressions: rename/create the upload-request and local upload endpoints, enforce Zod validation and UUID param validation consistently, preserve 1GB limits and blocked extensions, generate 15-minute S3 presigned PUT URLs when S3_UPLOADS_BUCKET is configured, support multipart local dev uploads into uploads/, and return metadata plus download URL from GET /api/files/:id with static serving for local uploads.

Update backend comment routes to fully match the requested comment thread API while fixing likely source of the previous errors: validate all document/comment IDs as UUIDs, make GET /api/documents/:id/comments return threads grouped by comment_id, support creating roots and replies via POST /api/documents/:id/comments, add dedicated POST /api/comments/:id/resolve, keep PATCH /api/comments/:id for content edits, and allow DELETE /api/comments/:id for author or admin only.

Revise backlinks routes to match the requested upsert behavior and response shape, including strict UUID validation on document IDs, GET /api/documents/:id/backlinks returning source document title and type for matching target_id rows, and POST /api/documents/:id/links performing upsert-style replacement from extracted links while returning a response consistent with the route behavior.

Refactor the frontend upload service API to align with the backend and remove likely type-check mismatches from the prior attempt: expose requestUpload, uploadFile, and trackUploadProgress, support either presigned S3 uploads or local multipart uploads, preserve 1GB checks and dangerous-extension blocking, and return normalized upload metadata used by editor integrations.

Implement and normalize the upload tracker service so active uploads can be observed safely across non-React and React callers, including the APIs needed for navigation warnings and upload progress tracking without introducing new typing errors.

Revise the comments React Query hook module to match the backend contract and frontend usage cleanly: define the thread/comment types returned by the grouped comments endpoint, expose fetch/create/update/resolve/delete mutations via TanStack Query, and ensure exported types/functions line up with editor consumers to eliminate prior new type errors.

tool_input.command: cd /Users/maxpetrusenko/Desktop/Gauntlet/ship-rebuild-rerun-20260327c && git status --short && ls api/src/routes && ls src/services && ls src/hooks

messages.content:
Implement file upload and inline comments systems for Ship.

For file uploads, create routes/files.ts with auth middleware: POST /api/files/upload-request (validates filename/mimeType/sizeBytes with Zod, blocks dangerous extensions like exe/bat/sh/dll/jar/ps1, creates a files row with status=pending, returns a presigned S3 upload URL if S3_UPLOADS_BUCKET is configured or a local upload endpoint for dev), POST /api/files/upload/:id (for local dev: accepts multipart form data, writes to uploads/ directory, updates files row to status=uploaded), GET /api/files/:id (returns file metadata + download URL). For S3: use @aws-sdk/client-s3 and @aws-sdk/s3-request-presigner with 15-minute URL expiration. For local dev: serve uploads/ as static files. Set max file size to 1GB. Validate UUID format on all ID params to prevent path traversal.

For comments, create routes/comments.ts with: GET /api/documents/:id/comments (list all comment threads for a document, grouped by comment_id), POST /api/documents/:id/comments (create a new comment thread with comment_id matching the TipTap comment mark, or reply to existing via parent_id), PATCH /api/comments/:id (update comment content), POST /api/comments/:id/resolve (set resolved_at timestamp), DELETE /api/comments/:id (only author or admin can delete). Create routes/backlinks.ts with: GET /api/documents/:id/backlinks (query document_links where target_id matches, return source documents with title and type), POST /api/documents/:id/links (upsert document_links from extracted mentions/links in content).

On the frontend, create src/services/upload.ts with: requestUpload (calls upload-request endpoint), uploadFile (either uploads directly to presigned S3 URL or to the local endpoint), trackUploadProgress. Create src/services/uploadTracker.ts to track active uploads and warn on navigation (UploadNavigationWarning component). Create src/hooks/useCommentsQuery.ts for fetching and mutating comments via TanStack Query.

Verify: pnpm type-check passes with 0 new errors.
